extension:
base-type="org.eclipse.core.runtime.text"
id="org.jkiss.dbeaver.json"
description="JSON" icon="platform:/plugin/org.jkiss.dbeaver.model/icons/types/json.svg"/>
icon="platform:/plugin/org.jkiss.dbeaver.model/icons/types/json.svg" <streamManager class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.data.managers.stream.JSONStreamValueManager" id="json" label="JSON" primaryMime="text/json" class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.editors.json.JSONTextEditor"
file-extensions="json"
